_readme: SECTOR-SCOPE GATE (r3s4, ruled 2026-07-18). A metric listed here EXISTS ONLY for orgs whose industry is in its sectors list — full hide on all four surfaces: not asked at data entry, no chart, no signals, excluded from the peer base (n = in-scope answerers). Enforced at org_visible_questions (THE focus filter every member route flows through) + seed-level answer absence. General mechanism: declare a qid + sectors; no bespoke code. Pilot: tips. Future users: shift premiums, tronc (currently the legacy module flag — unify later), London weighting.
